case.title: YOUNG v. UNITED STATES BOARD OF PAROLE

opinion.h: YOUNG v. UNITED STATES BOARD OF PAROLE, 386 U.S. 261 (1967)
386 U.S. 261"> YOUNG v. UNITED STATES BOARD OF PAROLE. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CIRCUIT. No. 1193, Misc. Decided March 13, 1967.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Marshall, Assistant Attorney General Vinson and Beatrice Rosenberg for appellee.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
